hero.subtitle: Come and Learn the Pure Unadulterated Word of God Through Hebrew Lenses

about.title: Walking in the Ancient Hebrew Path
about.body1: House of Israel Assembly is a vibrant Hebrew community dedicated to rediscovering the roots of our faith through the original Hebrew lens. We believe in the complete Word of God — unfiltered, unadulterated, and deeply rooted in the ancient traditions of Israel.
about.body2: Under the anointed leadership of Rabbi Dr. Phillip Banda, we journey together through the Torah, the Prophets, and the Writings, uncovering profound truths that transform lives.

rabbi_quote.quote: The Torah is not just a religious book — it is a living blueprint for righteous living, given to us through the Hebrew people. Come, let us walk this ancient path together.
rabbi_quote.author: Rabbi Dr. Phillip Banda
rabbi_quote.title: Host Rabbi · House of Israel Assembly

services.name: Shabbat Service
services.desc: Our main weekly Shabbat service featuring prayer, Torah reading, and the Rabbi's teaching.

services.name: Torah Study
services.desc: Deep dive into the weekly Torah portion with group discussion and Hebrew language study.

services.name: Prayer Meeting
services.desc: Corporate prayer and intercession as we usher in the Shabbat together as a community.

services.name: Youth Program
services.desc: Hebrew education and Torah teachings specially designed for our young ones and teenagers.
